ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Erica Rosenblatt for petitioner Raymond Navarra.

Ms. Rosenblatt reported that her client had suffered a heart attack 2 months after his appointment and as a result he was out of action for a while. He is now able to perform again and is working to bring the estate to closure. The matter was continued to February 1, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of the petition for final distribution or pepition to approve status report.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
